achievements.title: Practice Mode
achievements.description: Enter the cheat code and get 21 lives. Press A, B, B, Up, Up, Down, Left, Start at Title Screen.
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Deadshot
achievements.description: Defeat 10 enemies with one machine gun magazine without dropping the gun
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: A Story for the Grandkids
achievements.description: Take down 15 guards in a row with your bare hands and half health or less
achievements.author: Keltron3030

achievements.title: Killing Spree
achievements.description: Defeat 100 enemies (no cheat)
achievements.author: Keltron3030

achievements.title: YOU over HI
achievements.description: Beat the default high score. (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Lucky 7
achievements.description: Get 7 happy faces (No cheat codes.)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Confidence Build-Up
achievements.description: Beat the game using SNK cheat code.
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: No More Prison Food
achievements.description: Beat first mission with full Health (Health refill allowed) and without death. (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Hunger Strike
achievements.description: Beat "mid-boss" the mission boss in full health (Health refill allowed) without death. (Disgaea reference.)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: I'm Tired of Eating River Rats!
achievements.description: Beat the wrestler in mission 3 in full health  (Health refill allowed) without death.
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Adrenaline Rush
achievements.description: Beat mission 4 in full health (Health refill allowed) without death.
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Nirvana
achievements.description: Beat the tank in full health without death. No Continue allowed.
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Jacob's Ladder
achievements.description: Beat the final boss without death. (Health decrease allowed)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: "Braddock! Braddock!"
achievements.description: Finish all the missions  like Chuck Norris (MIA film reference). (No death nor cheat code.)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Brass Knuckle
achievements.description: Get Brass Knuckle before 1000pts  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Get Armor
achievements.description: Today's episode of P.O.W. has been brought to you by the letter A.  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Grab a Semi-Auto Machine Gun
achievements.description: Today's episode of P.O.W. has been brought to you by the letter G. Get this before 1000pts.  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Rambo Knife
achievements.description: Get a knife before 300pts.  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Grab a Grenade
achievements.description: Get a grenade (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Get a Life Refill
achievements.description: Today's episode of P.O.W. has been brought to you by the letter L.  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: BRAGging Rights
achievements.description: Possess BR-ass, A-rmor, and G-un
achievements.author: Keltron3030

achievements.title: Still Useful without Ammo
achievements.description: Don't drop the gun for the duration of 1st stage.  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Tae Kwan Do Expert
achievements.description: Reach 1st stage boss with jump kicks only deathless. (No use of weapons, punches nor normal kicks but you can pick up items.)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Blood-stained Knuckles
achievements.description: Beat stage 2 including boss with fists or elbows only and deathless. (No kicks or weapons use, item pickups ok)
achievements.author: Zaphnath

achievements.title: Escape with Loots
achievements.description: Get a hi score of 100,000 pts and beat the game.  (No cheat code)
achievements.author: Zaphnath
